# Capital Cascade — Idea Seeds · 2026-07-06

**9 seeds** (3 strong). Roles below: 🏗️ investor · ⛏️ supplier · 🎟️ enabler. ⚠️ = peak/danger phase.
### 🏗️ SK Telecom plans $653 billion AI data center buildout in Korea
**★★★★★** · _investor_ · _Boom_ · _data centers ai infra_ · The Korea Economic Daily Global Edition · 2026-07-06

Massive $653bn / 15GW AI data-center capex commitment by SK Telecom — one of the largest single announced buildouts in the global AI infra cycle, with clear Investor→Supplier cascade implications for power, cooling, and chip demand in Korea.

*Data to pull:* SK Telecom capex timeline and phasing; 15GW capacity staging; Korea data-center pipeline; Korean grid expansion plans; SKM capex vs revenue

*Tape:* SKM 31.8 (+35% 1y)

[source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMif0FVX3lxTE4tS1ZVSUU0cGtzZjdsRzJBRk5LaWNUdWRxSE5lY2dOcnJXZG5KWE5fYlcxNFNqdFlxVW9aTktiejNMSmE2a2FUekJ6SkhnUkZqcEZQekc3djg3TGpoNnpvYVdvb2I1RnRGYk5OeVJiYkNWc0JNR2ZpdkF6SlBTbnc?oc=5)

### 🏗️ TSMC's Pricing Firepower and $82 Billion Capex Ambition Set Stage for Earnings
**★★★★** · _investor_ · _Boom_ · _semiconductors_ · AD HOC NEWS · 2026-07-05

TSMC's $82bn capex ambition and pricing power confirm the semiconductor investor is still in full build mode — the foundational capex that cascades to equipment suppliers, materials, and power.

*Data to pull:* TSMC 2026 capex guidance; TSMC utilization rates; TSMC backlog by node; ASML/AMAT/KLAC order books

*Tape:* TSM 434.16 (+87% 1y), ASML 1769.32 (+124% 1y), AMAT 603.04 (+218% 1y), KLAC 235.55 (+156% 1y)

[source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixgFBVV95cUxQdHNRQV9Hbm5zR3NJdWVjUEprQ0tlbEx2RE0wdWdrdEdwaXYtaFNsMmwwemRRMy16T2VWT2RsLXBXMVhVVVJvSzNBS2dGMHgxUUdJTlFWSlRFTUZlMXZmMXQ5Wkd6WHhNM1BkMVhWLURCR1JxNTVUNnIxS1FRM21SU0hCb3hfUDRueVVDU1VJSXh5b0w4ZGNkRlJxYWZFWTV1X0Z5Q0tPSEdYS2lEY241dUs4dnJxaWtycXV4Q1pfYW9jdU4zblE?oc=5)

### 🏗️ CoreWeave shares dip after Q2 guidance miss, raised capex outlook
**★★★★** · _investor_ · _Boom_ · _data centers ai infra_ · Investing.com · 2026-07-05

CoreWeave raises capex even after a guidance miss — a textbook cascade signal where the investor keeps spending through the boom regardless of near-term revenue, raising the stakes for future oversupply.

*Data to pull:* CoreWeave capex guidance vs actual spend; GPU deployment schedule; revenue vs capex gap; debt and funding sources

*Tape:* CRWV 81.75 (-50% 1y)

[source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirAFBVV95cUxPb1V6aXBlSlJuWGdGQ2s2YWxiN2tIMEs0X1V3dUNNWmtVYl9MUmVVTFMtcFBETGFMVmxjeENmcldOT2F3c1JZcWtHcGZqMUtVZnVTbks1SUhtc0dLQVU5em5sWG82VDRxNndyUFpfQ202U1ZGWTVPSWZVZ2tIcVRSX3R0N1pVTjZQU1MxSF9KcjNaWDRQNGpCUUVxb2RMLUl4WlBQWXNJQTVWcUh4?oc=5)

### 🏗️ Applied Digital (NASDAQ: APLD) Burns Through Capital As AI Data Center Buildout Accelerates
**★★★** · _investor_ · _Boom_ · _data centers ai infra_ · foreignpolicyjournal.com · 2026-07-05

Applied Digital burning capital to accelerate AI data-center buildout — illustrates the cash-intensive, pre-revenue investor dynamic and the financing risk building underneath the boom.

*Data to pull:* APLD capex and cash burn rate; data center pipeline and MW deployed; funding sources and debt levels

*Tape:* APLD 33.06 (+216% 1y)

**★★** · _investor_ · _Boom_ · _airlines_ · ET TravelWorld · 2026-07-06

Akasa Air's 40th aircraft delivery marks continued airline fleet expansion in India — investor-side capex feeding Boeing and Airbus supplier cascades.

*Tape:* BA 226.49 (+5% 1y), EADSY 58.53 (+15% 1y)

### 🌐 German Factory Orders Beat Forecasts, Jump 1.9 Percent in May
**★★** · _macro_ · _Boom_ · _industrial materials_ · Menafn · 2026-07-06

German factory orders beating at +1.9% — a macro proxy for capex-driven equipment demand in Europe's industrial heartland, relevant as a supplier-side signal.

**★★** · _macro_ · _Boom_ · _semiconductors_ · The Korea Times · 2026-07-05

Korean government creating a fund from AI chip-boom tax windfall — a downstream fiscal signal that semiconductor profits are peaking, with government recycling windfall into new investment.

*Data to pull:* Korea semiconductor corporate tax revenue; chip industry profit trends YoY; fund size and allocation plan

### 🏗️ Government finances record strain on weak revenue performance, but capex push continues
**★★** · _investor_ · _Boom_ · _construction homebuilding_ · Moneycontrol.com · 2026-07-06

Government (likely India) maintaining capex push despite fiscal strain — public infrastructure spending as an investor feeding construction and materials suppliers even as finances tighten.

*Data to pull:* India government capex YoY; fiscal deficit vs capex ratio; infrastructure project pipeline
